name: Every End Effect Applyer
description: Optimizes and stabilizes visual effects for trigger-heavy levels like 'Every End'.

enable-mod.name: Enable Mod
enable-mod.description: Master toggle for the effect applyer.

bypass-alpha.name: Force Max Opacity
bypass-alpha.description: Prevents Alpha triggers from hiding objects. Helpful for visibility in heavy levels.

optimization-mode.name: Performance Mode
optimization-mode.description: Reduces frequency of visual updates to save CPU on Android devices.
